<script>
    // Password visibility toggle
    function togglePassword(field) {
        const input = document.getElementById(`id_${field}_password`);
        const icon = document.getElementById(`toggle${field.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + field.slice(1)}Icon`);
        
        if (input.type === 'password') {
            input.type = 'text';
            icon.classList.remove('fa-eye');
            icon.classList.add('fa-eye-slash');
        } else {
            input.type = 'password';
            icon.classList.remove('fa-eye-slash');
            icon.classList.add('fa-eye');
        }
    }

    // Password strength checker
    const passwordInput = document.getElementById('id_new_password');
    const strengthBar = document.getElementById('strengthBar');
    const strengthText = document.getElementById('strengthText');
    
    // Requirement elements
    const reqLength = document.getElementById('req-length');
    const reqUppercase = document.getElementById('req-uppercase');
    const reqLowercase = document.getElementById('req-lowercase');
    const reqNumber = document.getElementById('req-number');
    const reqSpecial = document.getElementById('req-special');

    // Password match checker
    const newPassword = document.getElementById('id_new_password');
    const confirmPassword = document.getElementById('id_confirm_password');
    const passwordMatch = document.getElementById('passwordMatch');
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');

    function checkPasswordStrength(password) {
        let strength = 0;
        let requirements = {
            length: password.length >= 8,
            uppercase: /[A-Z]/.test(password),
            lowercase: /[a-z]/.test(password),
            number: /[0-9]/.test(password),
            special: /[!@#$%^&*(),.?":{}|<>]/.test(password)
        };

        // Update requirement indicators
        reqLength.className = requirements.length ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqUppercase.className = requirements.uppercase ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqLowercase.className = requirements.lowercase ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqNumber.className = requirements.number ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqSpecial.className = requirements.special ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';

        // Update requirement icons
        reqLength.querySelector('i').className = requirements.length ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqUppercase.querySelector('i').className = requirements.uppercase ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqLowercase.querySelector('i').className = requirements.lowercase ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqNumber.querySelector('i').className = requirements.number ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqSpecial.querySelector('i').className = requirements.special ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';

        // Calculate strength
        strength = Object.values(requirements).filter(Boolean).length;

        // Update strength bar
        strengthBar.className = 'strength-bar';
        if (password.length === 0) {
            strengthBar.style.width = '0';
            strengthText.textContent = 'Enter a password';
        } else if (strength <= 2) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-weak');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Weak password';
        } else if (strength === 3) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-fair');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Fair password';
        } else if (strength === 4) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-good');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Good password';
        } else if (strength === 5) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-strong');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Strong password';
        }
    }

    function checkPasswordMatch() {
        const newPass = newPassword.value;
        const confirmPass = confirmPassword.value;
        
        if (confirmPass.length > 0) {
            if (newPass === confirmPass) {
                passwordMatch.style.display = 'block';
                passwordMatch.className = 'password-match match';
                passwordMatch.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check-circle me-1"></i><span class="small">Passwords match</span>';
            } else {
                passwordMatch.style.display = 'block';
                passwordMatch.className = 'password-match';
                passwordMatch.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-times-circle me-1"></i><span class="small">Passwords do not match</span>';
            }
        } else {
            passwordMatch.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    // Event listeners
    passwordInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
        checkPasswordStrength(this.value);
        checkPasswordMatch();
    });

    confirmPassword.addEventListener('input', checkPasswordMatch);

    // Form submission validation
    document.getElementById('passwordForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        const newPass = newPassword.value;
        const confirmPass = confirmPassword.value;
        
        if (newPass !== confirmPass) {
            e.preventDefault();
            alert('Passwords do not match!');
        }
    });

    // Initialize password strength on page load
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        if (passwordInput.value) {
            checkPasswordStrength(passwordInput.value);
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Floating particles ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const pc = document.getElementById('dashParticles');
    if (pc) {
        for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
            const p = document.createElement('div');
            const s = Math.random() * 4 + 1.5;
            const colors = [
                'rgba(193,58,16,', 'rgba(212,146,42,', 'rgba(16,185,129,',
                'rgba(59,130,246,', 'rgba(255,255,255,'
            ];
            const c = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
            Object.assign(p.style, {
                position: 'absolute',
                borderRadius: '50%',
                pointerEvents: 'none',
                width:  s + 'px',
                height: s + 'px',
                left:   Math.random() * 100 + '%',
                bottom: '-20px',
                background: c + (Math.random() * .18 + .04) + ')',
                boxShadow: `0 0 ${s*2}px ${c}.25)`,
                animation: `floatUp ${Math.random()*18+10}s linear infinite`,
                animationDelay: `-${Math.random()*12}s`,
                willChange: 'transform',
            });
            pc.appendChild(p);
        }
    }
});
</script>
<style>
@keyframes floatUp {
    from { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
    10%  { opacity: 1; }
    90%  { opacity: .6; }
    to   { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(540deg) scale(.5); opacity: 0; }
}
</style>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('downloadSearch');
        const typeFilter = document.getElementById('typeFilter');
        const applyBtn = document.getElementById('applyFilters');

        function applyFilters() {
            const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            
            if (searchInput.value) {
                params.set('q', searchInput.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('q');
            }
            
            if (typeFilter.value) {
                params.set('type', typeFilter.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('type');
            }
            
            window.location.href = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
        }

        applyBtn.addEventListener('click', applyFilters);
        
        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                applyFilters();
            }
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');
  .login-wrap{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#07080d;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
  .login-wrap::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 20% 50%,rgba(255,160,50,.07) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 80% 30%,rgba(255,100,80,.06) 0%,transparent 55%);pointer-events:none;}
  .grid-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.025) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.025) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 50% 50%,black,transparent);pointer-events:none;}
  .card{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:420px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:24px;padding:48px 40px;backdrop-filter:blur(24px);box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.5),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.07);animation:fadeUp .6s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) both;}
  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(255,160,50,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,160,50,.2);border-radius:99px;padding:4px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#ffa032;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;}

  function togglePw(){const i=document.querySelector('#pw-field input');const ic=document.getElementById('eye-icon');if(i.type==='password'){i.type='text';ic.innerHTML='<path d="M17.94 17.94A10.07 10.07 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a18.45 18.45 0 0 1 5.06-5.94"/><path d="M9.9 4.24A9.12 9.12 0 0 1 12 4c7 0 11 8 11 8a18.5 18.5 0 0 1-2.16 3.19"/><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>';}else{i.type='password';ic.innerHTML='<path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>';}}
</script>

        }

        }

        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 107, 74, 0.3);
        border-radius: 20px;

        border-radius: 10px;
        width: 100%;
    }

        border-color: var(--primary-accent);
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 107, 74, 0.2);
        outline: none;
    }

    .btn-close-white {
        filter: invert(1);
    }

        .stat-card {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;

            height: 35px;

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
        const typeFilter = document.getElementById('typeFilter');
        const sortFilter = document.getElementById('sortFilter');
        const applyBtn = document.getElementById('applyFilters');

        function applyFilters() {
            const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            
            if (searchInput.value) {
                params.set('q', searchInput.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('q');
            }
            
            if (typeFilter.value && typeFilter.value !== 'all') {
                params.set('type', typeFilter.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('type');
            }
            
            if (sortFilter.value) {
                params.set('sort', sortFilter.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('sort');
            }
            
            window.location.href = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
        }

        applyBtn.addEventListener('click', applyFilters);
        
        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                applyFilters();
            }
        });
    });

    function removeSavedItem(itemId) {
        if (confirm('Are you sure you want to remove this item from your saved items?')) {
            fetch('{% url "accounts:toggle_saved" %}', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token }}'
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    item_id: itemId,
                    action: 'remove'
                })
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            });
        }
    }

    function editNotes(itemId) {
        // Implement edit notes functionality
        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('editNotesModal'));
        modal.show();
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}

<script>
    function selectTheme(theme) {
        // Update hidden input
        document.getElementById('selectedTheme').value = theme;
        
        // Update active state
        document.querySelectorAll('.theme-option').forEach(option => {
            option.classList.remove('active');
        });
        event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
    }

    // Tab persistence
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Check for saved tab in localStorage
        const savedTab = localStorage.getItem('settingsTab');
        if (savedTab) {
            const tab = document.querySelector(`[data-bs-target="${savedTab}"]`);
            if (tab) {
                const tabInstance = new bootstrap.Tab(tab);
                tabInstance.show();
            }
        }

        // Save active tab to localStorage
        const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="pill"]');
        tabs.forEach(tab => {
            tab.addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', function(event) {
                localStorage.setItem('settingsTab', event.target.dataset.bsTarget);
            });
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}
===== FILE: ./templates/archive/detail.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}{{ entry.title }} - MfalmeBits Archive{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Page Header -->
<section class="page-header bg-dark text-white py-4">
    <div class="container">
        <nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
            <ol class="breadcrumb">
                <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="/" class="text-white-50">Home</a></li>
                <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'archive:index' %}" class="text-white-50">Archive</a></li>
                <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'archive:by_theme' entry.theme.slug %}" class="text-white-50">{{ entry.theme.name }}</a></li>
                <li class="breadcrumb-item active text-white" aria-current="page">{{ entry.title|truncatechars:50 }}</li>
            </ol>
        </nav>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Main Content -->
<section class="entry-content py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-8 mx-auto">
                <article class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                    {% if entry.featured_image %}
                    <img src="{{ entry.featured_image.url }}" class="card-img-top" alt="{{ entry.image_alt|default:entry.title }}">
                    {% endif %}
                    
                    <div class="card-body p-4 p-lg-5">
                        <h1 class="display-5 fw-bold mb-4">{{ entry.title }}</h1>
                        
                        <div class="entry-meta mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom">
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <p class="mb-1"><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i> By <strong>{{ entry.author }}</strong></p>
                                    <p class="mb-1"><i class="fas fa-calendar me-2"></i> Published: {{ entry.published_date|date:"F d, Y" }}</p>
                                    <p class="mb-1"><i class="fas fa-sync me-2"></i> Updated: {{ entry.updated_date|date:"F d, Y" }}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <p class="mb-1"><i class="fas fa-tag me-2"></i> Theme: <a href="{% url 'archive:by_theme' entry.theme.slug %}">{{ entry.theme.name }}</a></p>
                                    <p class="mb-1"><i class="fas fa-eye me-2"></i> Views: {{ entry.views_count }}</p>
                                    {% if entry.document %}
                                    <p class="mb-1"><i class="fas fa-download me-2"></i> Downloads: {{ entry.download_count }}</p>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        {% if entry.excerpt %}
                        <div class="entry-excerpt lead fst-italic text-muted mb-4 p-3 bg-light rounded">
                            {{ entry.excerpt }}
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                        
                        <div class="entry-content">
                            {{ entry.content|safe }}
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Tags -->
                        {% if entry.tags.all %}
                        <div class="entry-tags mt-4 pt-3 border-top">
                            <h5 class="h6 mb-3">Tags:</h5>
                            {% for tag in entry.tags.all %}
                            <a href="{% url 'archive:by_tag' tag.slug %}" class="badge bg-light text-dark text-decoration-none p-2 me-1 mb-2 border">
                                #{{ tag.name }}
                            </a>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                        
                        <!-- Document Download -->
                        {% if entry.document %}
                        <div class="entry-download mt-4 p-4 bg-light rounded">
                            <div class="row align-items-center">
                                <div class="col-md-8">
                                    <h5 class="h6 mb-2">Download Document</h5>
                                    <p class="small text-muted mb-md-0">Get the full document in {{ entry.get_document_type_display }} format.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-4 text-md-end">
                                    <form method="post" action="{% url 'archive:detail' entry.theme.slug entry.slug %}">
                                        {% csrf_token %}
                                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-download me-2"></i>Download
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                        
                        <!-- References -->
                        {% if entry.references %}
                        <div class="entry-references mt-4">
                            <h5 class="h6 mb-3">References & Sources</h5>
                            <div class="bg-light p-3 rounded small">
                                {{ entry.references|linebreaks }}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                        
                        <!-- Citation -->
                        {% if entry.citation_text %}
                        <div class="entry-citation mt-4">
                            <h5 class="h6 mb-3">How to Cite</h5>
                            <div class="bg-light p-3 rounded small font-monospace">
                                {{ entry.citation_text }}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                        
                        <!-- Author Bio -->
                        {% if entry.author_bio %}
                        <div class="author-bio mt-5 p-4 bg-light rounded">
                            <h5 class="h6 mb-3">About the Author</h5>
                            <p class="small mb-0">{{ entry.author_bio }}</p>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                    </div>
                </article>
                
                <!-- Related Entries -->
                {% if related_entries %}
                <section class="related-entries mt-5">
                    <h3 class="h4 mb-4">Related Entries</h3>
                    <div class="row g-4">
                        {% for related in related_entries %}
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
                                {% if related.featured_image %}
                                <img src="{{ related.featured_image.url }}" class="card-img-top" alt="{{ related.title }}" style="height: 120px; object-fit: cover;">
                                {% endif %}
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <h6 class="card-title">{{ related.title }}</h6>
                                    <p class="card-text small text-muted">{{ related.published_date|date:"M d, Y" }}</p>
                                    <a href="{% url 'archive:detail' related.theme.slug related.slug %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read</a>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </div>
                </section>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

                    {% endfor %}
                </select>
            </div>

                <select name="sort" class="form-select">
                    <option value="-published_date" {% if current_filters.sort == '-published_date' %}selected{% endif %}>Newest First</option>
                    <option value="published_date" {% if current_filters.sort == 'published_date' %}selected{% endif %}>Oldest First</option>
                    <option value="title" {% if current_filters.sort == 'title' %}selected{% endif %}>Title A-Z</option>

                    <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="First">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;&laquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Previous">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}

                {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                    {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                    <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                    {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                    <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}

                {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Next">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Last">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}
            </ul>
        </nav>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

                            <option value="-published_date" {% if request.GET.sort == '-published_date' %}selected{% endif %}>Newest First</option>
                            <option value="published_date" {% if request.GET.sort == 'published_date' %}selected{% endif %}>Oldest First</option>
                            <option value="title" {% if request.GET.sort == 'title' %}selected{% endif %}>Title A-Z</option>
                            <option value="-views_count" {% if request.GET.sort == '-views_count' %}selected{% endif %}>Most Viewed</option>

        </div>

                    {% endif %}

                        <p class="card-text text-muted small">

                        </p>

                        <div class="mb-2">
                            {% for tag in entry.tags.all|slice:":3" %}

                            {% endfor %}
                        </div>
                        <a href="{% url 'archive:detail' theme.slug entry.slug %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read More</a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            {% empty %}
            <div class="col-12 text-center py-5">
                <i class="fas fa-folder-open fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                <h3>No Entries Yet</h3>
                <p class="text-muted">There are no entries in this theme at the moment.</p>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>

        <!-- Pagination -->
        {% if is_paginated %}
        <nav class="mt-5">
            <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="First">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;&laquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Previous">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}

                {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                    {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                    <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                    {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                    <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}

                {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Next">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Last">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}
            </ul>
        </nav>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

    /* ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ

    ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ */

    .alert-danger, .alert-error { border-left-color: #ef4444; }
    .alert-danger .toast-icon, .alert-error .toast-icon { background: rgba(239,68,68,.14); color: #ef4444; }
    .alert-info { border-left-color: #3b82f6; }
    .alert-info .toast-icon { background: rgba(59,130,246,.14); color: #3b82f6; }

    /* ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
       REVEAL ANIMATIONS
    ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ */
    .reveal {
        opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px);
        transition: opacity .7s var(--ease), transform .7s var(--ease);
    }
    .reveal.on { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    .fade-in { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity .65s var(--ease), transform .65s var(--ease); }
    .fade-in.animate-in { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    .slide-in-left  { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-44px); transition: opacity .65s var(--ease), transform .65s var(--ease); }
    .slide-in-left.animate-in { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    .slide-in-right { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(44px); transition: opacity .65s var(--ease), transform .65s var(--ease); }
    .slide-in-right.animate-in { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    .scale-in { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.92); transition: opacity .6s var(--ease), transform .6s var(--spring); }
    .scale-in.animate-in { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    .hover-lift {
        transition: transform var(--base), box-shadow var(--base);
    }
    .hover-lift:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: var(--sh-xl); }

    /* ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
       FOOTER
    ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ */

    ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ */

<!-- ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
     MAIN CONTENT
ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ -->
<main class="main-content">

    {% if messages %}
    <div class="messages-container" role="alert" aria-live="polite">
        {% for message in messages %}
        <div class="glass-alert alert-{{ message.tags }} alert-dismissible">
            <div class="toast-icon">
                <i class="fas {% if message.tags == 'success' %}fa-check{% elif message.tags == 'error' or message.tags == 'danger' %}fa-times{% elif message.tags == 'warning' %}fa-exclamation{% else %}fa-info{% endif %}"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="toast-body flex-1">
                <div class="toast-title">{% if message.tags == 'success' %}Success{% elif message.tags == 'error' or message.tags == 'danger' %}Error{% elif message.tags == 'warning' %}Warning{% else %}Info{% endif %}</div>
                <div class="toast-msg">{{ message }}</div>
            </div>
            <button class="toast-close" onclick="this.closest('.glass-alert').remove()" aria-label="Dismiss">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        {% endfor %}
    </div>
    {% endif %}

    {% block content %}{% endblock %}
</main>

<!-- ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ

<!-- ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
     FLOATING CONTROLS
ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ -->
<button id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle dark mode" title="Toggle theme">
    <i class="fas fa-sun"></i>
</button>
<button id="backToTop" aria-label="Back to top" title="Back to top">
    <i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i>
</button>

<!-- ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
     SCRIPTS
ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>

{% compress js %}
<script src="{% static 'js/main.js' %}"></script>
{% endcompress %}

{% block extra_js %}{% endblock %}

<script>
(function () {
    'use strict';

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Theme ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const root  = document.documentElement;
    const tBtn  = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
    const tIcon = tBtn ? tBtn.querySelector('i') : null;

    /* Default to dark */
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('mbTheme') || 'dark';

    function applyTheme(t) {
        root.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
        localStorage.setItem('mbTheme', t);
        if (tIcon) tIcon.className = t === 'dark' ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
    }
    applyTheme(saved);
    tBtn && tBtn.addEventListener('click', () =>
        applyTheme(root.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'));

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Loading screen ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            const ls = document.getElementById('loadingScreen');
            if (ls) ls.classList.add('hidden');
        }, 500);
    });

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Navbar scroll state ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const nav = document.querySelector('.navbar');
    function handleNavScroll() {
        if (!nav) return;
        nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 50);
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleNavScroll, { passive: true });
    handleNavScroll();

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Scroll progress + back-to-top ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const bar = document.getElementById('scrollProgress');
    const btt = document.getElementById('backToTop');

    function onScroll() {
        const st = document.documentElement.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop;
        const h  = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - document.documentElement.clientHeight;
        if (bar) bar.style.width = (st / h * 100) + '%';
        if (btt) btt.classList.toggle('visible', st > 400);
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
    btt && btt.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }));

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Scroll reveal ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(e => {
            if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
            e.target.classList.add('on', 'animate-in');
            io.unobserve(e.target);
        });
    }, { threshold: .07, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .fade-in, .slide-in-left, .slide-in-right, .scale-in')
            .forEach((el, i) => {
                el.style.transitionDelay = (i % 7) * .07 + 's';
                io.observe(el);
            });

        /* Auto-dismiss toasts */
        document.querySelectorAll('.glass-alert').forEach(el => {
            setTimeout(() => {
                el.style.opacity = '0';
                el.style.transform = 'translateX(115%)';
                el.style.transition = 'opacity .45s ease, transform .45s ease';
                setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 460);
            }, 5500);
        });
    });

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Custom cursor ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const dot  = document.getElementById('cursorDot');
    const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
    let mx = -120, my = -120, rx = -120, ry = -120;

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY; });

    function animCursor() {
        if (dot)  { dot.style.left = mx + 'px'; dot.style.top = my + 'px'; }
        rx += (mx - rx) * .11;
        ry += (my - ry) * .11;
        if (ring) { ring.style.left = rx + 'px'; ring.style.top = ry + 'px'; }
        requestAnimationFrame(animCursor);
    }
    animCursor();

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Magnetic buttons ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    function initMagnetic() {
        document.querySelectorAll(
            '.btn-primary-mb, .btn-ghost-mb, .btn-ochre-mb, .btn-glass-mb'
        ).forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
                const r = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - r.left - r.width  / 2) * .2;
                const y = (e.clientY - r.top  - r.height / 2) * .2;
                this.style.transform = `translate(${x}px,${y}px) translateY(-3px)`;
            });
            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
                this.style.transform = '';
            });
        });
    }
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initMagnetic);

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ App card tilt parallax ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.app-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
                const r = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width  - .5;
                const y = (e.clientY - r.top)  / r.height - .5;
                this.style.transform =
                    `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${y * -5}deg) rotateY(${x * 5}deg) translateY(-10px) scale(1.014)`;
            });
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
                this.style.transform = '';
            });
        });
    });

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Counter animation ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const cIO = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(e => {
            if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
            const el = e.target;
            const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target || el.textContent, 10);
            if (!isFinite(target)) return;
            let count = 0;
            const step = Math.ceil(target / 100);
            const t = setInterval(() => {
                count = Math.min(count + step, target);
                el.textContent = count.toLocaleString();
                if (count >= target) clearInterval(t);
            }, 14);
            cIO.unobserve(el);
        });
    }, { threshold: .5 });
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.counter').forEach(el => cIO.observe(el));
    });

})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
===== FILE: ./templates/blog/archive.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}{{ seo_title }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Archive Header -->
<section class="archive-header py-5 bg-primary text-white">
    <div class="container text-center">
        <h1 class="display-4 fw-bold mb-3">
            {% if archive_month %}
                Archive: {{ month_name }} {{ archive_year }}
            {% elif archive_year %}
                Archive: {{ archive_year }}
            {% else %}
                Blog Archive
            {% endif %}
        </h1>
        <p class="lead mb-0">{{ posts.paginator.count }} post{{ posts.paginator.count|pluralize }} found</p>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Archive Content -->
<section class="archive-content py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-8 mx-auto">
                <nav aria-label="breadcrumb" class="mb-4">
                    <ol class="breadcrumb">
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'home' %}">Home</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'blog:index' %}">Blog</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">
                            {% if archive_month %}
                                {{ month_name }} {{ archive_year }}
                            {% elif archive_year %}
                                {{ archive_year }}
                            {% else %}
                                Archive
                            {% endif %}
                        </li>
                    </ol>
                </nav>

                <!-- Archive Navigation -->
                <div class="archive-nav mb-5">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <select class="form-select" id="year-select" onchange="window.location.href=this.value">
                                <option value="">Select Year</option>
                                {% get_archive_years as years %}
                                {% for year in years %}
                                <option value="{% url 'blog:archive_year' year.year %}" {% if year.year == archive_year %}selected{% endif %}>
                                    {{ year.year }}
                                </option>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        {% if archive_year %}
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <select class="form-select" id="month-select" onchange="window.location.href=this.value">
                                <option value="">Select Month</option>
                                {% get_month_names as months %}
                                {% for month_num, month_name in months.items %}
                                <option value="{% url 'blog:archive_month' archive_year month_num %}" 
                                        {% if month_num == archive_month|add:"0" %}selected{% endif %}>
                                    {{ month_name }}
                                </option>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {% if posts %}
                <div class="posts-list">
                    {% for post in posts %}
                    <article class="post-item mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="h5 mb-2">
                                    <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
                                        {{ post.title }}
                                    </a>
                                </h3>
                                <div class="post-meta small text-muted mb-2">
                                    <span><i class="far fa-calendar-alt me-1"></i> {{ post.published_date|date:"F j, Y" }}</span>
                                    <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-user me-1"></i> {{ post.author.get_full_name|default:post.author.username }}</span>
                                    <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-folder me-1"></i> {{ post.category.name }}</span>
                                </div>
                                <p class="text-muted small">{{ post.excerpt|truncatewords:20 }}</p>
                            </div>
                            {% if post.featured_image %}
                            <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="ms-3 flex-shrink-0">
                                <img src="{{ post.featured_image.url }}" 
                                     alt="{{ post.image_alt|default:post.title }}"
                                     style="width: 80px; height: 80px; object-fit: cover;"
                                     class="rounded-3">
                            </a>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    </article>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>

                <!-- Pagination -->
                {% if is_paginated %}
                <nav aria-label="Page navigation" class="mt-4">
                    <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                        {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}" aria-label="Previous">
                                <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}

                        {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                            {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                            <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                            {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                            <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}

                        {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}" aria-label="Next">
                                <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
                {% endif %}

                {% else %}
                <div class="text-center py-5">
                    <i class="fas fa-archive fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                    <h3>No posts found</h3>
                    <p class="text-muted">There are no posts in this archive period.</p>
                    <a href="{% url 'blog:index' %}" class="btn btn-primary mt-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Back to Blog
                    </a>
                </div>
                {% endif %}

                    {% for post in posts %}
                    <article class="post-item mb-5 pb-4 border-bottom">
                        <div class="row">

                                </a>
                            </div>

                            {% endif %}

                                    <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-folder me-1"></i> {{ post.category.name }}</span>
                                    <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-clock me-1"></i> {{ post.reading_time }} min read</span>
                                </div>
                                <h3 class="h5">
                                    <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
                                        {{ post.title }}
                                    </a>
                                </h3>
                                <p class="text-muted small">{{ post.excerpt|truncatewords:25 }}</p>
                                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                                    <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                        Read More <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ms-2"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <div class="post-stats small text-muted">
                                        <span><i class="far fa-eye me-1"></i> {{ post.views_count }}</span>
                                        <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-comment me-1"></i> {{ post.comments.count }}</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </article>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>

                <!-- Pagination -->
                {% if is_paginated %}
                <nav aria-label="Page navigation" class="mt-4">
                    <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                        {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}" aria-label="Previous">
                                <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}

                        {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                            {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                            <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                            {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                            <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}

                        {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}" aria-label="Next">
                                <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
                {% endif %}

                {% else %}
                <div class="text-center py-5">
                    <i class="fas fa-pen-fancy fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                    <h3>No posts yet</h3>
                    <p class="text-muted">This author hasn't published any posts yet.</p>
                </div>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

          </div>

          <!-- Post Items -->

              <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i>
            </a>
            {% else %}
            <span class="pag-btn disabled"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></span>
            {% endif %}

            {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}

              {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}

              {% endif %}
            {% endfor %}

            {% if page_obj.has_next %}

              <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
            </a>
            {% else %}
            <span class="pag-btn disabled"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></span>
            {% endif %}
          </nav>
          {% endif %}

          {% else %}
          <div class="cat-empty">
            <i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>

<script>
  // Auto-dismiss after 6 seconds
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.comment-msg').forEach(el => {
      el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.4s, transform 0.4s';
      el.style.opacity = '0'; el.style.transform = 'translateX(30px)';
      setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 400);
    });
  }, 6000);
</script>

                <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);">Comments</span>
                <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-weight:600;">{{ comments.count }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

<script>
  // Reading progress bar
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const doc = document.documentElement;
    const scrolled = (doc.scrollTop / (doc.scrollHeight - doc.clientHeight)) * 100;
    document.getElementById('reading-progress').style.width = scrolled + '%';
  });

  // Auto-build TOC from article headings
  (function() {
    const content = document.querySelector('.bd-article-content');
    const toc     = document.getElementById('toc-list');
    if (!content || !toc) return;
    const headings = content.querySelectorAll('h2, h3');
    if (!headings.length) { toc.innerHTML = '<li><span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#8A7A68;">No headings found.</span></li>'; return; }
    toc.innerHTML = '';
    headings.forEach((h, i) => {
      if (!h.id) h.id = 'heading-' + i;
      const li = document.createElement('li');
      const a  = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = '#' + h.id;
      a.className = 'bd-toc-link' + (h.tagName === 'H3' ? '" style="padding-left:1.1rem;font-size:0.78rem;' : '"');
      a.textContent = h.textContent;
      a.onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); h.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); };
      li.appendChild(a);
      toc.appendChild(li);
    });

    // Active TOC link on scroll
    const tocLinks = toc.querySelectorAll('.bd-toc-link');
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      let cur = '';
      headings.forEach(h => { if (window.scrollY >= h.offsetTop - 120) cur = h.id; });
      tocLinks.forEach(a => a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('href') === '#' + cur));
    });
  })();

  // Comment reply
  function setParent(id, name) {
    document.getElementById('parent-comment').value = id;
    document.getElementById('reply-label').textContent = 'Replying to ' + name;
    document.getElementById('reply-indicator').classList.add('show');
    document.getElementById('comment-form').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    const ta = document.querySelector('#comment-form textarea');
    if (ta) ta.focus();
  }
  function cancelReply() {
    document.getElementById('parent-comment').value = '';
    document.getElementById('reply-indicator').classList.remove('show');
    const ta = document.querySelector('#comment-form textarea');
    if (ta) ta.placeholder = '';
  }

  // Style Django form widgets
  document.querySelectorAll('#comment-form input[type=text], #comment-form input[type=email], #comment-form input[type=url]').forEach(el => el.classList.add('bd-input'));
  document.querySelectorAll('#comment-form textarea').forEach(el => el.classList.add('bd-textarea'));

  // Copy URL
  function copyUrl() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href).then(() => {
      const btn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
      btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Copied!';
      btn.style.background = '#3D9E6A'; btn.style.color = '#fff';
      setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-link"></i> Copy Link'; btn.style.background = ''; btn.style.color = ''; }, 2000);
    });
  }
</script>
{% endblock %}

              <ul class="bi-archive-months">
                {% for month in year.months %}
                <li class="bi-archive-month">
                  <a href="{% url 'blog:archive_month' year|date:'Y' month|date:'m' %}">
                    {{ month|date:'F' }}
                    <span class="bi-arch-cnt">({{ month.count }})</span>
                  </a>
                </li>
                {% endfor %}
              </ul>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
          </div>
          {% endif %}

<script>
  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Sort ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  function applySort(v) {
    const p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    p.set('sort', v); p.delete('page');
    window.location.href = window.location.pathname + '?' + p;
  }

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ View toggle ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  document.getElementById('vlist').addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.getElementById('postcards').className = 'bi-postcards';
    this.classList.add('on'); document.getElementById('vgrid').classList.remove('on');
  });
  document.getElementById('vgrid').addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.getElementById('postcards').className = 'bi-postcards bi-postcards-grid';
    this.classList.add('on'); document.getElementById('vlist').classList.remove('on');
  });

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Picks carousel ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  (function() {
    const row = document.getElementById('picks-row');
    if (!row) return;
    const cards = row.querySelectorAll('.bi-pick-card');
    if (!cards.length) return;
    let idx = 0;
    function vis() { return window.innerWidth > 820 ? 3 : window.innerWidth > 560 ? 2 : 1; }
    function move() {
      const w = cards[0].getBoundingClientRect().width + 18.4;
      row.style.transform = `translateX(-${idx * w}px)`;
    }
    document.getElementById('picks-next')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (idx < cards.length - vis()) { idx++; move(); }
    });
    document.getElementById('picks-prev')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (idx > 0) { idx--; move(); }
    });
    window.addEventListener('resize', () => { idx = 0; move(); });
  })();

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Archive toggle ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  function toggleArch(btn) {
    const ul = btn.nextElementSibling;
    ul.classList.toggle('open');
    btn.classList.toggle('open');
  }

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Newsletter AJAX ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  document.getElementById('nl-form')?.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fetch(this.action, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: new FormData(this),
      headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
    })
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(d => {
      toast(d.success ? (d.message || 'Subscribed!') : 'Error. Try again.', d.success ? 'ok' : 'err');
      if (d.success) this.reset();
    })
    .catch(() => toast('An error occurred.', 'err'));
  });

  function toast(msg, type) {
    const t = document.getElementById('bi-toast');
    t.className = 'bi-toast ' + type;
    t.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-${type === 'ok' ? 'check-circle' : 'exclamation-circle'}"></i> ${msg}`;
    t.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 4000);
  }

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Scroll to top ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    document.getElementById('scroll-top').classList.toggle('show', window.scrollY > 400);
  });
</script>
{% endblock %}

<article class="post-card">
  <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="post-card-img-link">
    <div class="post-card-img-wrap">
      {% if post.featured_image %}
      <img src="{{ post.featured_image.url }}"
           alt="{{ post.image_alt|default:post.title }}"
           class="post-card-img"
           loading="lazy">
      {% else %}
      <div class="post-card-img-placeholder">
        <i class="fas fa-feather-alt"></i>
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      <div class="post-card-img-overlay"></div>
      <div class="post-card-category-badge">
        <a href="{{ post.category.get_absolute_url }}" class="post-card-cat">{{ post.category.name }}</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <div class="post-card-body">
    <div class="post-card-meta">
      <span class="post-card-date"><i class="far fa-calendar-alt"></i> {{ post.published_date|date:"M d, Y" }}</span>
      <span class="post-card-read"><i class="far fa-clock"></i> {{ post.reading_time }} min</span>
    </div>

    <h3 class="post-card-title">
      <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}">{{ post.title|truncatechars:72 }}</a>
    </h3>

    <p class="post-card-excerpt">{{ post.excerpt|truncatewords:18 }}</p>

    <div class="post-card-footer">
      <div class="post-card-author">
        <i class="fas fa-user-circle post-card-author-icon"></i>
        <span>{{ post.author.get_full_name|default:post.author.username }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="post-card-stats">
        <span><i class="far fa-eye"></i> {{ post.views_count }}</span>
        <span><i class="far fa-comment"></i> {{ post.comments.count }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</article>

/* Footer */

  padding-top: 0.9rem; border-top: 1px solid #F0EBE2;
  font-size: 0.78rem; color: #8A7A68; font-weight: 500;
}
.post-card-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
.post-card-author-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #C9973A; }
.post-card-stats { display: flex; gap: 10px; }
.post-card-stats i { color: #C9973A; margin-right: 3px; }
</style>

                                         style="height: 100px; width: 100%; object-fit: cover;">

                            </div>

                            <div class="col-12">
                            {% endif %}

                                    </a>

                        </div>

                                <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>

                            {% if page_obj.number == num %}

                            {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}

                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}

                                <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
                {% endif %}

                                                <i class="fas fa-paper-plane me-2"></i>Re-subscribe
                                            </button>
                                        </div>
                                    </form>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Error State -->

                                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle fa-3x"></i>

                                    </p>

                                        <a href="{% url 'contact' %}" class="btn btn-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-envelope me-2"></i>Contact Support
                                        </a>
                                        <a href="{% url 'home' %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-home me-2"></i>Return to Home
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            {% endfor %}
                        {% else %}

                                     style="width: 80px; height: 80px;">

                                        <i class="fas fa-ban me-2"></i>Confirm Unsubscribe

                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<style>
    .icon-box {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
    }
    .icon-box:hover {
        transform: scale(1.1);
    }
    .newsletter-form .form-control:focus {
        border-color: #0d6efd;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25);
    }
</style>

<script>
    // Handle newsletter re-subscription via AJAX
    document.querySelectorAll('.newsletter-form').forEach(form => {
        form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            const formData = new FormData(this);
            
            fetch(this.action, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData,
                headers: {
                    'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
                    'X-CSRFToken': formData.get('csrfmiddlewaretoken')
                }
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    alert(data.message);
                    window.location.reload();
                } else {
                    alert('Error: ' + (data.errors?.email?.[0] || 'Unable to subscribe'));
                }
            })
            .catch(error => {
                console.error('Error:', error);
                alert('An error occurred. Please try again.');
            });
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

<!-- JavaScript -->
<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Counter Animation
        const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.counter');
        const speed = 200;

        const animateCounter = (counter) => {
            const target = parseInt(counter.getAttribute('data-target'));
            const count = parseInt(counter.innerText);
            const increment = Math.ceil(target / speed);
            
            if (count < target) {
                counter.innerText = Math.min(count + increment, target);
                setTimeout(() => animateCounter(counter), 10);
            } else {
                counter.innerText = target;
            }
        };

        const counterObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    animateCounter(entry.target);
                    counterObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.5 });

        counters.forEach(counter => counterObserver.observe(counter));

        // Magnetic Buttons
        const magneticElements = document.querySelectorAll('.magnetic');
        
        magneticElements.forEach(element => {
            element.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
                const rect = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;
                
                this.style.transform = `translate(${x * 0.3}px, ${y * 0.3}px)`;
            });
            
            element.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
                this.style.transform = 'translate(0px, 0px)';
            });
        });

        // Tilt Effect
        const tiltElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-tilt]');
        
        tiltElements.forEach(element => {
            element.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
                const rect = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                
                const centerX = rect.width / 2;
                const centerY = rect.height / 2;
                
                const angleX = (y - centerY) / 25;
                const angleY = (centerX - x) / 25;
                
                this.style.transform = `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${angleX}deg) rotateY(${angleY}deg) scale(1.02)`;
            });
            
            element.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
                this.style.transform = 'perspective(1000px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) scale(1)';
            });
        });
    });
</script>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/OwlCarousel2/2.3.4/assets/owl.carousel.min.css">

<style>
    .proposal-hero {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0c0f 0%, #1a1e24 100%);
        min-height: 300px;
    }

    /* Progress Steps */
    .form-progress {
        position: relative;
        margin-bottom: 3rem;
    }

    .progress-steps {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }

    .step {
        text-align: center;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
    }

    .step-number {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        background: var(--dark-soft);
        border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        border-radius: 50%;
        color: var(--text-muted);
        font-weight: 600;
        margin: 0 auto 0.5rem;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .step.active .step-number {
        background: var(--gradient-1);
        border-color: var(--primary);
        color: white;
    }

    .step-label {
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    .step.active .step-label {
        color: var(--primary-light);
    }

    .progress-bar-container {
        position: absolute;
        top: 20px;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 2px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        z-index: 1;
    }

    .progress-bar-fill {
        height: 100%;
        background: var(--gradient-1);
        transition: width 0.3s ease;
    }

    /* Form Sections */
    .form-section {
        display: none;
    }

    .form-section.active {
        display: block;
    }

    .budget-fields {
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }
</style>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Multi-step form navigation
        const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.form-section');
        const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');
        const progressBar = document.querySelector('.progress-bar-fill');
        const nextBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.next-step');
        const prevBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.prev-step');
        let currentStep = 0;

        function showStep(step) {
            sections.forEach(section => section.classList.remove('active'));
            sections[step].classList.add('active');
            
            steps.forEach((s, index) => {
                if (index <= step) {
                    s.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                    s.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });
            
            const progress = ((step + 1) / sections.length) * 100;
            progressBar.style.width = progress + '%';
        }

        nextBtns.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (currentStep < sections.length - 1) {
                    currentStep++;
                    showStep(currentStep);
                }
            });
        });

        prevBtns.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (currentStep > 0) {
                    currentStep--;
                    showStep(currentStep);
                }
            });
        });

        // Toggle budget fields
        const hasBudgetCheckbox = document.getElementById('{{ form.has_budget.id_for_label }}');
        const budgetFields = document.querySelectorAll('.budget-fields');
        
        if (hasBudgetCheckbox) {
            hasBudgetCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function() {
                budgetFields.forEach(field => {
                    field.style.display = this.checked ? 'block' : 'none';
                });
            });
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

                        <div class="accordion" id="accordion{{ forloop.counter }}">
                            {% for faq in group.list %}
                            <div class="accordion-item border-0 mb-3 shadow-sm">

                                    <button class="accordion-button collapsed" 
                                            type="button" 
                                            data-bs-toggle="collapse" 
                                            data-bs-target="#collapse{{ forloop.parentloop.counter }}{{ forloop.counter }}">

                                        </div>
                                    </button>

                                     class="accordion-collapse collapse"

                                    <div class="accordion-body">

                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>

                    <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                        {% if page_obj.has_previous %}

                                <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}

                        {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                            {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                            <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                            {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                            <li class="page-item">
                                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}{% if current_filters.q %}&q={{ current_filters.q }}{% endif %}{% if current_filters.category %}&category={{ current_filters.category }}{% endif %}">
                                    {{ num }}
                                </a>
                            </li>
                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}

                        {% if page_obj.has_next %}

                                <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
                {% endif %}

                {% else %}
