===== FILE: ./templates/contact/faq_detail.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}{{ seo_title }}{% endblock %}
{% block description %}{{ seo_description }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- FAQ Detail -->
<section class="faq-detail py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-8 mx-auto">
                <!-- Breadcrumb -->
                <nav aria-label="breadcrumb" class="mb-4">
                    <ol class="breadcrumb">
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'home' %}">Home</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'contact:faq' %}">FAQs</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{ faq.question|truncatechars:50 }}</li>
                    </ol>
                </nav>

                <!-- FAQ Content -->
                <article class="faq-content">
                    <div class="card border-0 shadow-lg">
                        <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white py-4">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                                <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">{{ faq.get_category_display }}</span>
                                <small><i class="far fa-eye me-2"></i>{{ faq.views_count }} views</small>
                            </div>
                            <h1 class="h3 mt-3">{{ faq.question }}</h1>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body p-5">
                            <div class="faq-answer">
                                {{ faq.answer|safe }}
                            </div>

                            <!-- Was this helpful? -->
                            <div class="helpful-section mt-5 pt-4 border-top text-center">
                                <h5 class="h6 mb-3">Was this answer helpful?</h5>
                                <div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3">
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm" onclick="markHelpful(true)">
                                        <i class="fas fa-thumbs-up me-2"></i>Yes
                                    </button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm" onclick="markHelpful(false)">
                                        <i class="fas fa-thumbs-down me-2"></i>No
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </article>

                <!-- Related FAQs -->
                {% if related_faqs %}
                <div class="related-faqs mt-5">
                    <h3 class="h5 mb-4">Related Questions</h3>
                    <div class="list-group">
                        {% for related in related_faqs %}
                        <a href="{% url 'contact:faq_detail' related.pk %}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <span><i class="fas fa-question-circle text-primary me-2"></i>{{ related.question }}</span>
                            <small class="text-muted"><i class="far fa-eye me-1"></i>{{ related.views_count }}</small>
                        </a>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </div>
                </div>
                {% endif %}

                <!-- Still Need Help -->
                <div class="still-need-help mt-5 text-center bg-light p-5 rounded-3">
                    <i class="fas fa-headset fa-3x text-primary mb-3"></i>
                    <h4 class="h5 mb-3">Still Need Help?</h4>
                    <p class="text-muted mb-4">Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is ready to assist.</p>
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3">
                        <a href="{% url 'contact:support' %}" class="btn btn-primary">
                            <i class="fas fa-ticket-alt me-2"></i>Open Support Ticket
                        </a>
                        <a href="{% url 'contact:index' %}#contact-form" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
                            <i class="fas fa-envelope me-2"></i>Contact Us
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<script>
    function markHelpful(helpful) {
        // Send feedback to server
        fetch('{% url "contact:faq_detail" faq.pk %}', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token }}',
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({ helpful: helpful })
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                // Show thank you message
                const message = helpful ? 'Thank you for your feedback!' : 'We\'ll work on improving this answer.';
                alert(message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
        });
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}

        <div class="row justify-content-center">
            <div class="col-lg-8">
                <div class="accordion" id="faqAccordion">
                    {% for faq in faqs %}
                    <div class="accordion-item border-0 mb-3 shadow-sm">
                        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="heading{{ forloop.counter }}">
                            <button class="accordion-button {% if not forloop.first %}collapsed{% endif %}" 
                                    type="button" 
                                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" 
                                    data-bs-target="#collapse{{ forloop.counter }}">
                                {{ faq.question }}
                            </button>
                        </h3>
                        <div id="collapse{{ forloop.counter }}" 
                             class="accordion-collapse collapse {% if forloop.first %}show{% endif %}"
                             data-bs-parent="#faqAccordion">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                {{ faq.answer|safe }}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
                <div class="text-center mt-4">
                    <a href="{% url 'contact:faq' %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
                        View All FAQs <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ms-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>
{% endif %}

    }

        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d6efd 0%, #0a58ca 100%);
    }
    .quick-contact-item {
        background: rgba(34, 27, 27, 0.88);
        padding: 1rem 2rem;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }
    .form-control:focus, .form-select:focus {
        border-color: #0d6efd;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25);
    }
</style>

<script>
    // AJAX form submission
    document.getElementById('contactForm')?.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const form = this;
        const formData = new FormData(form);
        const submitBtn = form.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');
        
        // Disable button and show loading
        submitBtn.disabled = true;
        submitBtn.innerHTML = '<span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Sending...';
        
        fetch(form.action, {
            method: 'POST',
            body: formData,
            headers: {
                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
                'X-CSRFToken': formData.get('csrfmiddlewaretoken')
            }
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                // Show success message
                const alert = `
                    <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                        ${data.message}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
                form.insertAdjacentHTML('beforebegin', alert);
                form.reset();
            } else {
                // Show errors
                let errorHtml = '<div class="alert alert-danger"><ul class="mb-0">';
                for (let field in data.errors) {
                    errorHtml += `<li>${data.errors[field].join(', ')}</li>`;
                }
                errorHtml += '</ul></div>';
                form.insertAdjacentHTML('beforebegin', errorHtml);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            const alert = `
                <div class="alert alert-danger" role="alert">
                    An error occurred. Please try again.
                </div>
            `;
            form.insertAdjacentHTML('beforebegin', alert);
        })
        .finally(() => {
            // Re-enable button
            submitBtn.disabled = false;
            submitBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-paper-plane me-2"></i>Send Message';
            
            // Scroll to top
            window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% extends 'base.html' %}

<!-- Ticket Header -->

<!-- Ticket Content -->
<section class="ticket-content py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-8 mx-auto">
                <!-- Ticket Status -->
                <div class="ticket-status mb-4">
                    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                                <div>
                                    <h1 class="h5 mb-2">Ticket #{{ ticket.ticket_id }}</h1>
                                    <p class="text-muted small mb-0">
                                        <i class="fas fa-clock me-2"></i>Created: {{ ticket.created_at|date:"F j, Y \a\t g:i A" }}
                                    </p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="status-badge">
                                    <span class="badge {% if ticket.status == 'open' %}bg-success{% elif ticket.status == 'in_progress' %}bg-info{% elif ticket.status == 'waiting' %}bg-warning{% elif ticket.status == 'resolved' %}bg-primary{% else %}bg-secondary{% endif %} p-2">
                                        {{ ticket.get_status_display }}
                                    </span>
                                    <span class="badge {% if ticket.priority == 'urgent' %}bg-danger{% elif ticket.priority == 'high' %}bg-warning{% elif ticket.priority == 'medium' %}bg-info{% else %}bg-success{% endif %} ms-2 p-2">
                                        {{ ticket.get_priority_display }}
                                    </span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Original Ticket -->
                <div class="original-ticket mb-4">
                    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                        <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                                <span><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i>{{ ticket.name }}</span>
                                <span class="small">{{ ticket.created_at|date:"g:i A" }}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h5 class="h6 text-primary mb-3">{{ ticket.get_category_display }}: {{ ticket.subject }}</h5>
                            <p class="mb-3">{{ ticket.description|linebreaksbr }}</p>
                            
                            {% if ticket.attachment %}
                            <div class="attachment mt-3">
                                <a href="{{ ticket.attachment.url }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
                                    <i class="fas fa-paperclip me-2"></i>View Attachment
                                </a>
                            </div>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Replies -->
                {% if ticket.replies.all %}
                <div class="replies-section mb-4">
                    <h3 class="h6 mb-3">Replies</h3>
                    {% for reply in ticket.replies.all %}
                        {% if not reply.is_internal %}
                        <div class="reply mb-3">
                            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                                <div class="card-header {% if reply.user %}bg-info text-white{% else %}bg-secondary text-white{% endif %}">
                                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                                        <span>
                                            <i class="fas {% if reply.user %}fa-user{% else %}fa-robot{% endif %} me-2"></i>
                                            {% if reply.user %}{{ reply.user.get_full_name|default:reply.user.username }}{% else %}MfalmeBits Support{% endif %}
                                        </span>
                                        <span class="small">{{ reply.created_at|date:"g:i A" }}</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <p class="mb-0">{{ reply.message|linebreaksbr }}</p>
                                    {% if reply.attachment %}
                                    <div class="attachment mt-3">
                                        <a href="{{ reply.attachment.url }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
                                            <i class="fas fa-paperclip me-2"></i>View Attachment
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
                {% endif %}

                <!-- Reply Form -->
                {% if ticket.status != 'resolved' and ticket.status != 'closed' %}
                <div class="reply-form mt-5">
                    <h3 class="h6 mb-3">Add Reply</h3>
                    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <form method="post" action="{% url 'contact:ticket_reply' ticket.ticket_id %}" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                                {% csrf_token %}
                                
                                <div class="mb-3">
                                    <label for="{{ reply_form.message.id_for_label }}" class="form-label">Your Message</label>
                                    {{ reply_form.message }}
                                </div>
                                
                                <div class="mb-3">
                                    <label for="{{ reply_form.attachment.id_for_label }}" class="form-label">Attachment (optional)</label>
                                    {{ reply_form.attachment }}
                                    <div class="form-text">Max 20MB. Allowed: PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, PNG, ZIP</div>
                                </div>
                                
                                <div class="text-end">
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                                        <i class="fas fa-paper-plane me-2"></i>Send Reply
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                {% endif %}

                <!-- Close Ticket -->
                {% if ticket.status != 'resolved' and ticket.status != 'closed' %}
                <div class="close-ticket text-center mt-4">
                    <button class="btn btn-link text-danger" onclick="closeTicket()">
                        <i class="fas fa-times-circle me-2"></i>Close this ticket
                    </button>
                </div>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

    .status-badge .badge {
        font-size: 0.875rem;
    }
    .card-header {
        border-bottom: none;
    }
    .reply-form textarea {
        min-height: 100px;
    }
</style>

<script>
    function closeTicket() {
        if (confirm('Are you sure you want to close this ticket?')) {
            fetch('{% url "contact:ticket_detail" ticket.ticket_id %}', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token }}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'close' })
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            })
            .catch(error => {
                console.error('Error:', error);
            });
        }
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<!-- Remove main-enhanced.js reference - using existing JS files -->
<script>
    // Particles background
    function createParticles() {
        const container = document.getElementById('heroParticles');
        if (!container) return;

        for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            const particle = document.createElement('div');
            particle.className = 'particle';

            const size = Math.random() * 5 + 2;
            const posX = Math.random() * 100;
            const posY = Math.random() * 100;
            const delay = Math.random() * 5;
            const duration = Math.random() * 10 + 10;

            particle.style.cssText = `
                position: absolute;
                width: ${size}px;
                height: ${size}px;
                left: ${posX}%;
                top: ${posY}%;
                background: rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.2);
                border-radius: 50%;
                pointer-events: none;
                animation: floatParticle ${duration}s linear infinite;
                animation-delay: -${delay}s;
            `;

            container.appendChild(particle);
        }
    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        createParticles();
    });
</script>

<style>
    @keyframes floatParticle {
        from { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
        to { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(360deg); }
    }

    .particle {
        position: absolute;
        background: rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.2);
        border-radius: 50%;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

<script>
    // Particles Background
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const particlesContainer = document.getElementById('heroParticles');
        if (particlesContainer) {
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const particle = document.createElement('div');
                particle.className = 'particle';
                
                const size = Math.random() * 5 + 2;
                const posX = Math.random() * 100;
                const posY = Math.random() * 100;
                const delay = Math.random() * 5;
                const duration = Math.random() * 10 + 10;
                
                particle.style.cssText = `
                    width: ${size}px;
                    height: ${size}px;
                    left: ${posX}%;
                    top: ${posY}%;
                    animation-delay: ${delay}s;
                    animation-duration: ${duration}s;
                    opacity: ${Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.1};
                    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, ${Math.random() * 0.3});
                    box-shadow: 0 0 ${size * 2}px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
                    animation: floatParticle ${duration}s linear infinite;
                `;
                
                particlesContainer.appendChild(particle);
            }
        }
    });

    @keyframes floatParticle {
        from { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
        to { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(360deg); }
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}

<!-- Using existing CSS files - no extra references needed -->
<style>
    /* Additional custom styles that complement the main CSS */
    .faq-hero {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0c0f 0%, #1a1e24 100%);
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
    }
    
    .faq-hero::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        background: url('{% static "images/pattern.svg" %}') repeat;
        opacity: 0.05;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    
    .search-box .form-control {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        color: white;
        padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
        font-size: 1.1rem;
        border-radius: 50px;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }
    
    .search-box .form-control:focus {

        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    }

<!-- Particles JavaScript -->
<script>
    function createParticles() {
        const container = document.getElementById('heroParticles');
        if (!container) return;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            const particle = document.createElement('div');
            particle.className = 'particle';
            
            const size = Math.random() * 5 + 2;
            const posX = Math.random() * 100;
            const posY = Math.random() * 100;
            const delay = Math.random() * 5;
            const duration = Math.random() * 10 + 10;
            
            particle.style.cssText = `
                width: ${size}px;
                height: ${size}px;
                left: ${posX}%;
                top: ${posY}%;
                background: rgba(255, 107, 74, ${Math.random() * 0.3});
                box-shadow: 0 0 ${size * 2}px rgba(255, 107, 74, 0.3);
                animation: floatParticle ${duration}s linear infinite;
                animation-delay: -${delay}s;
            `;
            
            container.appendChild(particle);
        }
    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        createParticles();
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Animated wordmark ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const wordmark = 'MfalmeBits';
    const wrap = document.getElementById('brandWordmark');
    if (wrap) {
        const accents = { 0: 'accent-terra', 7: 'accent-ochre' }; // M ŌåÆ terra, B ŌåÆ ochre

        wordmark.split('').forEach((char, i) => {
            const span = document.createElement('span');
            span.className = 'brand-char' + (accents[i] ? ' ' + accents[i] : '');
            span.textContent = char;
            span.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.055 + 0.1) + 's';
            wrap.appendChild(span);
        });
    }

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Hero particles ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const pc = document.getElementById('heroParticles');
    if (pc) {
        const palette = [
            'rgba(193,58,16,', 'rgba(212,146,42,',
            'rgba(255,255,255,', 'rgba(26,92,58,'
        ];
        for (let i = 0; i < 45; i++) {
            const p = document.createElement('div');
            const s = Math.random() * 3.5 + 1;
            const c = palette[Math.floor(Math.random() * palette.length)];
            Object.assign(p.style, {
                position: 'absolute', borderRadius: '50%', pointerEvents: 'none',
                width: s + 'px', height: s + 'px',
                left: Math.random() * 100 + '%',
                top: Math.random() * 100 + '%',
                background: c + (Math.random() * .18 + .04) + ')',
                animation: `drift ${Math.random()*20+14}s ease-in-out infinite alternate`,
                animationDelay: `-${Math.random()*15}s`,
            });
            pc.appendChild(p);
        }
    }

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Scroll cue ŌåÆ scroll on click ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const sc = document.getElementById('scrollCue');
    if (sc) sc.addEventListener('click', () =>
        window.scrollTo({ top: window.innerHeight, behavior: 'smooth' }));

    /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Counter animation ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
    const cIO = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(e => {
            if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
            const el = e.target;
            const target = +el.dataset.target;
            if (!isFinite(target)) return;
            let count = 0;
            const step = Math.ceil(target / 110);
            const t = setInterval(() => {
                count = Math.min(count + step, target);
                el.textContent = count.toLocaleString();
                if (count >= target) clearInterval(t);
            }, 14);
            cIO.unobserve(el);
        });
    }, { threshold: .5 });
    document.querySelectorAll('.counter').forEach(el => cIO.observe(el));

});
</script>
<style>
@keyframes drift {
    from { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); opacity: .5; }
    to   { transform: translate(30px, -40px) rotate(180deg); opacity: .15; }
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

                    <!-- Introduction -->
                    <section id="introduction" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">1. Introduction</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">Welcome to MfalmeBits ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.</p>
                        <p class="text-muted">Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the site.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Information We Collect -->
                    <section id="information-we-collect" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">2. Information We Collect</h2>
                        
                        <h5 class="mb-3">2.1 Personal Information You Provide</h5>
                        <p class="text-muted">We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted mb-4">
                            <li>Register for an account</li>
                            <li>Subscribe to our newsletter</li>
                            <li>Make a purchase</li>
                            <li>Contact us for support</li>
                            <li>Participate in surveys or promotions</li>
                        </ul>
                        <p class="text-muted">This information may include:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted">
                            <li>Name and contact information (email, phone number)</li>
                            <li>Billing and payment information</li>
                            <li>Account credentials</li>
                            <li>Profile information</li>
                        </ul>

                        <h5 class="mb-3 mt-4">2.2 Information Automatically Collected</h5>
                        <p class="text-muted">When you visit our website, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted">
                            <li>IP address</li>
                            <li>Browser type and version</li>
                            <li>Operating system</li>
                            <li>Pages visited and time spent</li>
                            <li>Referring website addresses</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>

                    <!-- How We Use Your Information -->
                    <section id="how-we-use" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">3. How We Use Your Information</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">We use the information we collect to:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted">
                            <li>Provide, operate, and maintain our website and services</li>
                            <li>Process your transactions and send related information</li>
                            <li>Send you technical notices, updates, and support messages</li>
                            <li>Respond to your comments, questions, and requests</li>
                            <li>Send you marketing communications (with your consent)</li>
                            <li>Monitor and analyze usage patterns and trends</li>
                            <li>Improve our website and services</li>
                            <li>Detect, prevent, and address technical issues or fraud</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Cookies & Tracking -->
                    <section id="cookies" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">4. Cookies & Tracking Technologies</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our website and hold certain information. Cookies are files with small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier.</p>
                        
                        <h5 class="mb-3 mt-4">Types of Cookies We Use:</h5>
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-bordered">
                                <thead class="bg-light">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Cookie Type</th>
                                        <th>Purpose</th>
                                        <th>Duration</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>Essential Cookies</td>
                                        <td>Required for basic site functionality</td>
                                        <td>Session / Persistent</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>Analytics Cookies</td>
                                        <td>Help us understand how visitors interact with our site</td>
                                        <td>Up to 2 years</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>Preference Cookies</td>
                                        <td>Remember your settings and preferences</td>
                                        <td>Up to 1 year</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>Marketing Cookies</td>
                                        <td>Track visitors across websites for advertising</td>
                                        <td>Up to 90 days</td>
                                    </tr>
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                        
                        <p class="text-muted mt-3">You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our website.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Data Sharing & Disclosure -->
                    <section id="data-sharing" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">5. Data Sharing & Disclosure</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">We may share your personal information in the following situations:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted">
                            <li><strong>Service Providers:</strong> We may share your information with third-party vendors who perform services on our behalf (e.g., payment processing, data analysis, email delivery).</li>
                            <li><strong>Business Transfers:</strong> In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business.</li>
                            <li><strong>Legal Requirements:</strong> If required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities.</li>
                            <li><strong>With Your Consent:</strong> We may disclose your information for any other purpose with your consent.</li>
                        </ul>
                        <p class="text-muted">We do not sell your personal information to third parties.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Data Security -->
                    <section id="data-security" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">6. Data Security</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted">
                            <li>Encryption of sensitive data using SSL/TLS protocols</li>
                            <li>Regular security assessments and penetration testing</li>
                            <li>Access controls and authentication procedures</li>
                            <li>Secure data storage and backup systems</li>
                        </ul>
                        <p class="text-muted">However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Your Rights -->
                    <section id="your-rights" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">7. Your Rights</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including:</p>
                        <ul class="text-muted">
                            <li>The right to access your personal information</li>
                            <li>The right to correct inaccurate information</li>
                            <li>The right to delete your information</li>
                            <li>The right to restrict or object to processing</li>
                            <li>The right to data portability</li>
                            <li>The right to withdraw consent</li>
                        </ul>
                        <p class="text-muted">To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in the "Contact Us" section below. We will respond to your request within 30 days.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Children's Privacy -->
                    <section id="children" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">8. Children's Privacy</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from children without verification of parental consent, we will take steps to remove that information.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Changes to Policy -->
                    <section id="changes" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">9. Changes to This Privacy Policy</h2>
                        <p class="text-muted">We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.</p>
                    </section>

                    <!-- Contact Us -->
                    <section id="contact" class="mb-5">
                        <h2 class="h3 mb-4">10. Contact Us</h2>

            flex-direction: column;

<!-- Navbar JavaScript (Preserved exactly as before) -->
<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const navbar = document.querySelector('.serenity-navbar');
        const searchToggle = document.querySelector('.search-toggle');
        const searchOverlay = document.getElementById('searchOverlay');
        const searchClose = document.querySelector('.search-close');
        const navbarCollapse = document.getElementById('navbarMain');

        // Navbar scroll effect
        function handleScroll() {
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                navbar.classList.add('scrolled');
            } else {
                navbar.classList.remove('scrolled');
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

        // Search overlay toggle
        if (searchToggle && searchOverlay) {
            searchToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
                searchOverlay.classList.add('active');
                const searchInput = searchOverlay.querySelector('.search-input');
                if (searchInput) {
                    setTimeout(() => searchInput.focus(), 100);
                }
            });
        }

        if (searchClose && searchOverlay) {
            searchClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
                searchOverlay.classList.remove('active');
            });

            // Close on escape key
            document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape' && searchOverlay.classList.contains('active')) {
                    searchOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });

            // Close on overlay click
            searchOverlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === searchOverlay) {
                    searchOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });
        }

        // Close mobile menu on link click
        if (navbarCollapse) {
            const navLinks = navbarCollapse.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
            navLinks.forEach(link => {
                link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (window.innerWidth < 992) {
                        const bsCollapse = bootstrap.Collapse.getInstance(navbarCollapse);
                        if (bsCollapse) {
                            bsCollapse.hide();
                        }
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        // Handle logout form submission to prevent default link behavior
        const logoutForms = document.querySelectorAll('form[action*="logout"]');
        logoutForms.forEach(form => {
            form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
                // Allow normal form submission
                return true;
            });
        });
    });
</script>

<!-- Notification -->
<div class="calc-notif" id="calc-notif"></div>

<script>
  const form        = document.getElementById('calc-form');
  const planSelect  = document.getElementById('plan-select');
  const usersInput  = document.getElementById('users-input');
  const usersRange  = document.getElementById('users-range');
  const resultsPanel = document.getElementById('results-panel');
  const resultsData  = document.getElementById('results-data');
  const resultsEmpty = document.getElementById('results-empty');

  // Keep slider + number input in sync
  usersRange.addEventListener('input', () => { usersInput.value = usersRange.value; });
  usersInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
    const v = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(usersInput.value) || 1, 1), 10000);
    usersRange.value = Math.min(v, 500);
  });

  function showNotif(msg, type='error') {
    const el = document.getElementById('calc-notif');
    el.className = `calc-notif ${type}`;
    el.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-${type==='error'?'exclamation-circle':'check-circle'}"></i> ${msg}`;
    el.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), 3500);
  }

  function fmt(n) { return '$' + n.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }); }

  form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    if (!planSelect.value) {
      showNotif('Please select a plan first.', 'error');
      planSelect.focus();
      return;
    }

    const opt       = planSelect.options[planSelect.selectedIndex];
    const basePrice = parseFloat(opt.dataset.price);
    const setupFee  = parseFloat(opt.dataset.setup);
    const minUsers  = parseInt(opt.dataset.min);
    const maxUsers  = parseInt(opt.dataset.max);
    const planName  = opt.dataset.name;
    const numUsers  = parseInt(usersInput.value);

    if (!numUsers || numUsers < 1) { showNotif('Please enter a valid number of users.', 'error'); return; }
    if (numUsers < minUsers) { showNotif(`This plan requires at least ${minUsers} users.`, 'error'); return; }
    if (maxUsers !== -1 && numUsers > maxUsers) { showNotif(`This plan supports up to ${maxUsers} users.`, 'error'); return; }

    let discount = 0;
    if (numUsers > 100)     discount = 20;
    else if (numUsers > 50) discount = 15;
    else if (numUsers > 20) discount = 10;
    else if (numUsers > 10) discount = 5;

    const subtotal      = basePrice * numUsers;
    const discountAmt   = subtotal * (discount / 100);
    const total         = subtotal - discountAmt + setupFee;

    document.getElementById('results-plan-name').textContent = planName;
    document.getElementById('res-base').textContent      = fmt(basePrice) + ' / user';
    document.getElementById('res-users').textContent     = numUsers.toLocaleString() + ' users';
    document.getElementById('res-subtotal').textContent  = fmt(subtotal);
    document.getElementById('res-discount').textContent  = discount > 0 ? `ŌłÆ${fmt(discountAmt)} (${discount}%)` : 'None';
    document.getElementById('res-setup').textContent     = setupFee > 0 ? fmt(setupFee) : 'Waived';
    document.getElementById('res-total').textContent     = fmt(total);

    resultsEmpty.style.display = 'none';
    resultsData.style.display  = 'block';
    resultsPanel.classList.add('visible');

    setTimeout(() => {
      resultsPanel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
    }, 100);

    showNotif('Estimate calculated!', 'success');
  });

  // Reveal panel on page load
  setTimeout(() => { resultsPanel.classList.add('visible'); }, 200);
</script>

{% endblock %}

{% extends "base.html" %}
{% load static %}

{% block seo_title %}{{ seo_title }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}

<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');

  :root {
    --gold: #C9973A;
    --gold-light: #E8B855;
    --ink: #0E0C0A;
    --ink-soft: #1C1814;
    --clay: #2A1F14;
    --sand: #F2EDE4;
    --sand-dark: #E0D5C5;
    --cream: #FDFAF5;
    --terracotta: #B85C38;
    --terracotta-light: #D4704E;
  }

  .cs-page { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--cream); color: var(--ink); }

<!-- FAQ Schema -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {"@type":"Question","name":"What types of institutions can license MfalmeBits content?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"We work with K-12 schools, universities, public libraries, NGOs, corporations, and government agencies worldwide."}},
    {"@type":"Question","name":"How does pricing work for institutions?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Pricing is based on institution type, number of users, and selected plan. Volume discounts of 5ŌĆō20% apply automatically."}},
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Can we access content across multiple campuses?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes, licenses support multi-campus deployments via IP authentication, proxy servers, and SSO."}}
  ]
}
</script>

<script>
  // Accordion toggle
  function toggleFaq(btn) {
    const item = btn.closest('.faq-item');
    const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
    document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item.open').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('open'));
    if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
  }

  // Sidebar active state on scroll
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-section');
  const catLinks  = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-cat-item a');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    let current = '';
    sections.forEach(s => { if (window.scrollY >= s.offsetTop - 120) current = '#' + s.id; });
    catLinks.forEach(a => { a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('href') === current); });
  });

  // Search / filter
  const searchInput = document.getElementById('faq-search');
  const noResults   = document.getElementById('faq-no-results');
  searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
    const q = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    let matched = 0;
    document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(item => {
      const q_text = item.querySelector('.faq-q-text').textContent.toLowerCase();
      const a_text = item.querySelector('.faq-answer p').textContent.toLowerCase();
      const match  = !q || q_text.includes(q) || a_text.includes(q);
      item.style.display = match ? '' : 'none';
      if (match) matched++;
      if (match && q) item.classList.add('open');
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.faq-section').forEach(sec => {
      const visible = [...sec.querySelectorAll('.faq-item')].some(i => i.style.display !== 'none');
      sec.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
    });
    noResults.style.display = matched === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
</script>

{% endblock %}

<script>
  // Style Django form widgets
  document.querySelectorAll('input[type=text], input[type=email], input[type=url], input[type=number], input[type=tel], input[type=date]').forEach(el => {
    if (!el.id || el.id === 'inq-file-input') return;
    el.classList.add('inq-input');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('select').forEach(el => el.classList.add('inq-select'));
  document.querySelectorAll('textarea').forEach(el => el.classList.add('inq-textarea'));
  document.querySelectorAll('input[type=file]').forEach(el => {
    el.id = 'inq-file-input'; el.classList.add('inq-file-input');
  });

  // File input label
  const fileInput = document.getElementById('inq-file-input');
  if (fileInput) {
    fileInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
      const chosen = document.getElementById('file-chosen');
      if (this.files && this.files[0]) {
        chosen.textContent = this.files[0].name;
        chosen.style.display = 'block';
      }
    });
  }

  // Drag & drop zone
  const dropZone = document.getElementById('file-drop-zone');
  if (dropZone && fileInput) {
    dropZone.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); dropZone.style.borderColor = 'var(--gold)'; dropZone.style.background = 'rgba(201,151,58,0.06)'; });
    dropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => { dropZone.style.borderColor = ''; dropZone.style.background = ''; });
    dropZone.addEventListener('drop', e => {
      e.preventDefault(); dropZone.style.borderColor = ''; dropZone.style.background = '';
      if (e.dataTransfer.files.length) {
        fileInput.files = e.dataTransfer.files;
        const chosen = document.getElementById('file-chosen');
        chosen.textContent = e.dataTransfer.files[0].name;
        chosen.style.display = 'block';
      }
    });
  }

  // Step indicator progress (visual only)
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.inq-fsection');
  const steps    = document.querySelectorAll('.inq-step');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const idx = [...sections].indexOf(entry.target);
        steps.forEach((s, i) => {
          s.classList.remove('active', 'done');
          if (i < idx) s.classList.add('done');
          else if (i === idx) s.classList.add('active');
        });
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.5 });
  sections.forEach(s => observer.observe(s));
</script>

{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Success Message -->
<section class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center py-16">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div class="max-w-2xl mx-auto text-center">
            <div class="mb-8">

                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-5xl text-green-500"></i>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-6">Thank You!</h1>
            
            <p class="text-xl text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 mb-8">
                Your institutional inquiry has been received. Our team will review your request and contact you within 24 hours.
            </p>
            
            <div class="glass p-6 mb-8 text-left">
                <h3 class="font-bold mb-4">What happens next?</h3>
                <ul class="space-y-3">
                    <li class="flex items-start">
                        <span class="w-6 h-6 bg-primary text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mr-3 text-sm">1</span>
                        <span>Our institutional specialist will review your requirements</span>

<!-- Category JavaScript -->
<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Filter functionality
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('productSearch');
        const formatFilter = document.getElementById('formatFilter');
        const sortFilter = document.getElementById('sortFilter');
        const applyBtn = document.getElementById('applyFilters');

        function applyFilters() {
            const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            
            if (searchInput.value) params.set('q', searchInput.value);
            else params.delete('q');
            
            if (formatFilter.value) params.set('format', formatFilter.value);
            else params.delete('format');
            
            if (sortFilter.value) params.set('sort', sortFilter.value);
            else params.delete('sort');
            
            window.location.href = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
        }

        applyBtn.addEventListener('click', applyFilters);
        
        // Enter key in search
        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') applyFilters();
        });

        // Add to cart functionality
        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-add-to-cart').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const productId = this.dataset.productId;
                
                // Show toast notification
                showToast('Product added to cart!', 'success');
            });
        });
    });

    function showToast(message, type = 'success') {
        // Simple toast implementation
        const toast = document.createElement('div');
        toast.className = `toast-notification toast-${type}`;
        toast.innerHTML = `
            <i class="fas fa-${type === 'success' ? 'check-circle' : 'info-circle'} me-2"></i>
            ${message}
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(toast);
        
        setTimeout(() => toast.classList.add('show'), 100);
        setTimeout(() => {
            toast.classList.remove('show');
            setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);
        }, 3000);
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}

<!-- Stripe JS -->
<script src="https://js.stripe.com/v3/"></script>
<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Initialize Stripe
        const stripe = Stripe('{{ stripe_public_key }}');
        const elements = stripe.elements();

        // Custom styling
        const style = {
            base: {
                color: '#ffffff',
                fontFamily: '"Inter", sans-serif',
                fontSize: '16px',
                '::placeholder': {
                    color: '#6c757d'
                },
                padding: '10px 12px',
            },
            invalid: {
                color: '#dc3545',
                iconColor: '#dc3545'
            }
        };

        // Create card element
        const cardElement = elements.create('card', {
            style: style,
            hidePostalCode: true
        });
        cardElement.mount('#card-element');

        // Handle validation errors
        cardElement.on('change', function(event) {
            const displayError = document.getElementById('card-errors');
            if (event.error) {
                displayError.textContent = event.error.message;
            } else {
                displayError.textContent = '';
            }
        });

        // Handle form submission
        const form = document.getElementById('payment-form');
        const submitButton = document.getElementById('submit-button');

        form.addEventListener('submit', async function(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            
            // Disable button to prevent multiple clicks
            submitButton.disabled = true;
            submitButton.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin me-2"></i>Processing...';

            try {
                // Create payment intent
                const response = await fetch('{% url "library:checkout" %}', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token }}'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({})
                });

                const { clientSecret, error } = await response.json();

                if (error) {
                    throw new Error(error);
                }

                // Confirm payment
                const { error: confirmError, paymentIntent } = await stripe.confirmCardPayment(clientSecret, {
                    payment_method: {
                        card: cardElement,
                        billing_details: {
                            name: '{{ user.get_full_name|default:user.username }}',
                            email: '{{ user.email }}'
                        }
                    }
                });

                if (confirmError) {
                    throw new Error(confirmError.message);
                }

                // Redirect to success page
                window.location.href = '{% url "library:success" %}?payment_intent=' + paymentIntent.id;

            } catch (error) {
                // Show error
                const errorElement = document.getElementById('card-errors');
                errorElement.textContent = error.message;

                // Re-enable button
                submitButton.disabled = false;
                submitButton.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-lock me-2"></i>Pay ${{ total }}';
            }
        });
    });
</script>

<style>
    .sticky-top {
        position: sticky;
        top: 100px;
        z-index: 1020;
    }

    .payment-form .glass-input {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);

    }

            position: static;
        }
    }
</style>

<!-- Cart JavaScript -->
<script>
let cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart') || '{}');

function addToCart(productId) {
    cart[productId] = (cart[productId] || 0) + 1;
    localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(cart));
    
    // Show notification
    showNotification('Product added to cart!');
    
    // Update cart count
    updateCartCount();
}

function toggleWishlist(productId) {
    fetch('', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
            'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token }}'
        },
        body: new URLSearchParams({
            'action': {% if in_wishlist %}'remove_from_wishlist'{% else %}'add_to_wishlist'{% endif %}
        })
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            const heartIcon = document.querySelector('.fa-heart');
            if (data.in_wishlist) {
                heartIcon.classList.add('text-red-500');
                showNotification('Added to wishlist!');
            } else {
                heartIcon.classList.remove('text-red-500');
                showNotification('Removed from wishlist!');
            }
        }
    });
}

function setRating(rating) {
    document.getElementById('rating').value = rating;
    
    // Update star colors
    document.querySelectorAll('.rating-stars button').forEach((star, index) => {
        if (index < rating) {
            star.classList.add('text-yellow-400');
            star.classList.remove('text-gray-400');
        } else {
            star.classList.remove('text-yellow-400');
            star.classList.add('text-gray-400');
        }
    });
}

function showNotification(message) {
    // Create notification element
    const notification = document.createElement('div');
    notification.className = 'fixed top-24 right-4 bg-primary text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-lg shadow-lg z-50 animate-fade-in-up';
    notification.textContent = message;
    
    document.body.appendChild(notification);
    
    // Remove after 3 seconds
    setTimeout(() => {
        notification.remove();
    }, 3000);
}

function updateCartCount() {
    const count = Object.values(cart).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    const cartCountElements = document.querySelectorAll('.cart-count');
    cartCountElements.forEach(el => {
        el.textContent = count;
        el.style.display = count > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';
    });
}

// Initialize
updateCartCount();
</script>
{% endblock %}

                                </div>
                                {% for category in categories %}
                                <div class="category-radio mb-2">
                                    <input type="radio" name="category" id="cat-{{ category.slug }}" 
                                           value="{{ category.slug }}"
                                           {% if current_filters.category == category.slug %}checked{% endif %}
                                           onchange="applyFilter('category', '{{ category.slug }}')">
                                    <label for="cat-{{ category.slug }}">
                                        {{ category.name }}
                                        <span class="count">({{ category.product_count }})</span>
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Formats Section -->
                    <div class="filter-section mb-4">
                        <button class="filter-toggle w-100 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#formatsCollapse">
                            <span class="fw-semibold">Formats</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                        </button>
                        <div class="collapse show" id="formatsCollapse">
                            <div class="filter-options mt-3">
                                {% for format_code, format_name in formats %}
                                <div class="format-checkbox mb-2">
                                    <input type="checkbox" id="format-{{ format_code }}" 
                                           value="{{ format_code }}"
                                           {% if current_filters.format == format_code %}checked{% endif %}
                                           onchange="applyFilter('format', this.checked ? '{{ format_code }}' : '')">
                                    <label for="format-{{ format_code }}">
                                        <i class="fas fa-{% if format_code == 'pdf' %}file-pdf{% elif format_code == 'epub' %}book{% elif format_code == 'mp3' %}music{% else %}file{% endif %} me-2"></i>
                                        {{ format_name }}
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Price Range Section -->
                    <div class="filter-section mb-4">
                        <button class="filter-toggle w-100 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#priceCollapse">
                            <span class="fw-semibold">Price Range</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                        </button>
                        <div class="collapse show" id="priceCollapse">
                            <div class="filter-options mt-3">
                                <div class="price-slider-container mb-3">
                                    <div class="price-inputs d-flex gap-2 mb-3">
                                        <div class="input-group">
                                            <span class="input-group-text">$</span>
                                            <input type="number" id="minPrice" class="form-control" placeholder="Min" value="{{ current_filters.min_price }}">
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="input-group">
                                            <span class="input-group-text">$</span>

                                        </div>

                                    <button class="btn btn-gradient btn-sm w-100" onclick="applyPriceFilter()">

                                    </button>

                                    <a href="#" onclick="setPriceRange(25,50)">$25 - $50</a>
                                    <a href="#" onclick="setPriceRange(50,100)">$50 - $100</a>
                                    <a href="#" onclick="setPriceRange(100,0)">Over $100</a>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Sort Section -->
                    <div class="filter-section mb-4">
                        <button class="filter-toggle w-100 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#sortCollapse">
                            <span class="fw-semibold">Sort By</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                        </button>
                        <div class="collapse show" id="sortCollapse">
                            <div class="filter-options mt-3">
                                <select class="form-select sort-select" onchange="applySort(this.value)">
                                    <option value="-created_at" {% if current_filters.sort == '-created_at' %}selected{% endif %}>Newest First</option>
                                    <option value="created_at" {% if current_filters.sort == 'created_at' %}selected{% endif %}>Oldest First</option>
                                    <option value="title" {% if current_filters.sort == 'title' %}selected{% endif %}>Title A-Z</option>
                                    <option value="-title" {% if current_filters.sort == '-title' %}selected{% endif %}>Title Z-A</option>
                                    <option value="price" {% if current_filters.sort == 'price' %}selected{% endif %}>Price: Low to High</option>
                                    <option value="-price" {% if current_filters.sort == '-price' %}selected{% endif %}>Price: High to Low</option>
                                    <option value="-purchase_count" {% if current_filters.sort == '-purchase_count' %}selected{% endif %}>Best Selling</option>
                                    <option value="-views_count" {% if current_filters.sort == '-views_count' %}selected{% endif %}>Most Viewed</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Active Filters -->
                    {% if current_filters.q or current_filters.category or current_filters.format or current_filters.min_price or current_filters.max_price %}
                    <div class="active-filters mt-4 pt-4 border-top">
                        <h6 class="small fw-bold mb-2 text-white">Active Filters:</h6>
                        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                            {% if current_filters.q %}
                            <span class="filter-badge">
                                "{{ current_filters.q }}"
                                <a href="?{% for key,value in current_filters.items %}{% if key != 'q' and value %}{{ key }}={{ value }}&{% endif %}{% endfor %}" class="remove-filter">├Ś</a>
                            </span>
                            {% endif %}
                            {% if current_filters.category %}
                            <span class="filter-badge">
                                {{ current_category.name }}
                                <a href="?{% for key,value in current_filters.items %}{% if key != 'category' and value %}{{ key }}={{ value }}&{% endif %}{% endfor %}" class="remove-filter">├Ś</a>
                            </span>
                            {% endif %}
                            {% if current_filters.format %}
                            <span class="filter-badge">
                                {{ current_filters.format|upper }}
                                <a href="?{% for key,value in current_filters.items %}{% if key != 'format' and value %}{{ key }}={{ value }}&{% endif %}{% endfor %}" class="remove-filter">├Ś</a>
                            </span>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    {% endif %}
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- ===== Products Grid - Modern Dark Theme ===== -->
            <div class="col-lg-9">
                <!-- Results Header -->
                <div class="results-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                    <div>
                        <h2 class="h4 fw-bold mb-1 text-white">
                            {% if current_filters.q %}
                                <i class="fas fa-search me-2 text-primary"></i>Search: "{{ current_filters.q }}"
                            {% elif current_filters.category %}
                                <i class="fas fa-folder me-2 text-primary"></i>{{ current_category.name }}
                            {% else %}
                                <i class="fas fa-book me-2 text-primary"></i>All Products
                            {% endif %}
                        </h2>
                        <p class="text-muted small mb-0">
                            {{ page_obj.paginator.count }} items found
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- View Toggle -->
                    <div class="view-toggle">
                        <button class="view-btn active" onclick="setView('grid')" title="Grid View">

                        </button>
                        <button class="view-btn" onclick="setView('list')" title="List View">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Featured Products Carousel -->
                {% if featured_products and not current_filters.q and not current_filters.category %}
                <div class="featured-section mb-5">
                    <div class="section-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">

                        {% for product in featured_products %}

                                    <div class="price">
                                        {% if product.is_on_sale %}

                                        {% endif %}

                </div>

                                            <i class="fas fa-user me-1"></i>{{ product.author }}
                                        </p>

                                                {% else %}

                                                {% endif %}
                                            {% endfor %}

                                            {% endwith %}
                                        </div>

                                            <div class="product-price">
                                                {% if product.is_on_sale %}

                                                {% else %}

                                                {% endif %}

                                        </div>

                    <ul class="pagination-modern">
                        {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                        <li class="page-item">

                            </a>
                        </li>
                        <li class="page-item">

                                <i class="fas fa-angle-left"></i>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                        
                        {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                            {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                            <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                            {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                            <li class="page-item">
                                <a class="page-link" href="?{% for key,value in request.GET.items %}{% if key != 'page' %}{{ key }}={{ value }}&{% endif %}{% endfor %}page={{ num }}">{{ num }}</a>
                            </li>
                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}
                        
                        {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?{% for key,value in request.GET.items %}{% if key != 'page' %}{{ key }}={{ value }}&{% endif %}{% endfor %}page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}" aria-label="Next">
                                <i class="fas fa-angle-right"></i>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?{% for key,value in request.GET.items %}{% if key != 'page' %}{{ key }}={{ value }}&{% endif %}{% endfor %}page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}" aria-label="Last">
                                <i class="fas fa-angle-double-right"></i>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
